title: AcolyteCryptographicManifest
description: Mandatory payload for any external AI agent (Acolyte) requesting access to the Cortex Protocol mediation layer. Validated by the KEROS gateway before any interaction is permitted.

schema_version.description: Schema version — must match active Governance Node specification.

request_uuid.description: UUIDv4. Unique per request. Prevents replay attacks.

acolyte_hardware_id.description: SHA-256 hash of the Acolyte's hardware attestation key (TPM or equivalent). Registered in the Governance Node Merkle tree.

functional_justification_hash.description: SHA-256 of the plain-text clinical justification document. Allows audit without transmitting the justification text.

requested_capabilities_root.description: Root of the Merkle tree of requested capability leaves. Each leaf: Hash(operation_id || resource || clinical_justification_hash).

proof_of_work.description: Dynamic PoW puzzle (V-UX-03 anti-DoS). Difficulty scales exponentially with repeated MVD rejections from this acolyte_hardware_id.

difficulty.description: Number of leading zero bits required in hash_result.

hash_result.description: SHA-256(request_uuid || nonce). Must satisfy difficulty requirement.
